series_metadata.series_description: Contains the history of MARCS towers placed on state or personal property that are used by emergency responders, hospitals, schools, daycare centers, etc. Document include the tower lease, and may include the memorandum of understanding used to adjust the contract, land or warrant deed, co-locater agreements, tower drawings, land and site surveys, structural analysis, applications, contract request forms, renewal and maintenance letters, vendor correspondence and email.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until stored electronically, then destroy. ; Electronic: Keep information five years past the end of the tower lease, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
